validator_prompt: Review whether the research output gives a cost-effective Alibaba Cloud ECS choice grounded in official ECS/Milvus docs and provides a concrete beginner-friendly deployment procedure for the current Docker Compose project.

architect_review.summary: The report ties the recommendation to the current Compose stack and Milvus hardware requirements, distinguishes minimum/recommended/stable options, lists user preparation needs, and provides an ordered deployment/testing flow with security and ICP caveats.
